flores-plus-devtest.name: FLORES+ Devtest
flores-plus-devtest.description: Multi-domain evaluation set from the FLORES+ project. 1012 sentences covering news, health, travel, and technology domains.

edtekla-dev-v1.name: EDTeKLA Development v1
edtekla-dev-v1.description: Educational technology corpus for Plains Cree (nêhiyawêwin). Domain-specific evaluation for indigenous language translation.
